description: Mapping from PyPI / npm dependency name to canonical framework name in docs/citations/framework_pattern_candidates.md. Used by scripts/ci/check_framework_intake.sh verify item #2 (Attribution) per ADR-00020. New direct dependencies (added in pyproject.toml / frontend/package.json) without a corresponding entry here cause framework_intake_violation_attribution.
_notes: ecosystem=npm: scoped names preserved verbatim as canonical (e.g., '@langchain/langgraph').
framework_canonical must exactly match the | **<name>** | header in docs/citations/framework_pattern_candidates.md table.
